name: Lauderdale Links - Golf Simulator
address: 3036 E Commercial Blvd, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33308
about: Lauderdale Links is a premier golf simulator and social club in Fort Lauderdale, featuring three state-of-the-art Foresight Sports GC Hawk simulator bays. Each bay is equipped with FSX Play software and a personal living room setup, accommodating up to 4 golfers or 6 guests. The facility offers hourly rentals with prices ranging from $25 to $50, making it accessible for both solo practice and group play. Open 12 PM to 12 AM daily, it also hosts corporate events, birthday parties, and seasonal leagues, providing a flexible venue for various social and competitive golf experiences. The technology emphasizes high-fidelity graphics and reliable ball tracking, with a focus on creating an immersive and comfortable environment for golfers of all skill levels.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Foresight Sports GC Hawk technology for accurate shot tracking
FSX Play software delivers true-to-life graphics and immersive gameplay
Flexible booking options with hourly rentals and event accommodations
Social atmosphere with living room setups in each simulator bay
Seasonal leagues with competitive formats and cash prize opportunities

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site kitchen mentioned; BYOB policy not specified
No mention of bar service; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Overhead launch monitor with object recognition and imaging technology

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players must bring their own clubs. No cleats are allowed, and balls must be cleaned before each round.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: BYOB policy not specified. Contact the venue directly for details on external food and drink.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A 9-hole round takes approximately 1 hour for 2 players or 2 hours for 4 players. 18-hole duration scales accordingly.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, players must be at least 18 years old to use the simulators.
